{"cards": [{"name": "Arcane Confluence", "mana_cost": "{3}{U}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Choose two —
• Draw three cards, then discard a card.
• Scry 3.
• Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.
• Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}.", "flavor_text": ""Knowledge flows like water—direct it wisely, and it becomes a torrent."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A modal sorcery that gives blue players flexible card selection and utility. The four modes cover blue's core strengths: card draw, scrying, bounce, and soft counterspells. Choosing two modes creates interesting decisions and powerful late-game plays while maintaining blue's color pie identity."}, {"name": "Withering Strike", "mana_cost": "{1}{B}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Destroy target creature with mana value 3 or less.", "flavor_text": ""Even the mightiest oak falls when its roots are severed."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A clean, conditional removal spell appropriate for common. The mana value restriction prevents it from being too powerful while still being useful in most game states. This follows black's color pie for creature destruction and provides good limited removal at a fair cost."}, {"name": "Graveyard Harvester", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Creature — Zombie Wizard", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, mill two cards.
Whenever a creature card is put into your graveyard from anywhere, you gain 1 life.", "flavor_text": "Death is not an end, but a beginning of new possibilities.", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "An uncommon creature that combines ETB mill with ongoing graveyard synergy. The lifegain trigger rewards graveyard strategies while staying in black's color pie. The 2/2 body for 3 mana is slightly below rate, balanced by the value generated from both abilities."}, {"name": "Vorthak, Death's Herald", "mana_cost": "{4}{B}{B}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Legendary Creature — Demon", "oracle_text": "Flying, menace
When ~ enters, each opponent sacrifices a creature.
{2}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "6", "toughness": "5", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "A mythic legendary demon that embodies black's themes of sacrifice and reanimation. The ETB forces opponents to sacrifice, while the activated ability provides repeatable reanimation. The 6/5 flying menace body is appropriately powerful for 6 mana, and the sorcery-speed restriction prevents abuse."}, {"name": "Scorching Bolt", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "~ deals 3 damage to any target.", "flavor_text": ""Precision and power—the hallmarks of a true pyromancer."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A straightforward burn spell that can target any legal target (creatures, planeswalkers, or players). At 2 mana for 3 damage, it's efficient removal or reach damage. The 'any target' wording is modern templating that covers all valid targets while keeping the text clean for common rarity."}]}
